excerpt: Following a nuclear holocaust, the world’s remaining superpowers engage in gladiatorial combat with giant robots manned by pilots nicknamed “Robot Jox.”
title: Robot Jox

excerpt: A vengeful mummy stalks the British archeologists and American showman who desecrated its tomb.
title: The Curse of the Mummy's Tomb

excerpt: Cat burglar Bruce Willis finds himself embroiled in a plot involving the Vatican, the CIA, and a pair of eccentric billionaires pursuing a machine made by Leonardo da Vinci that turns lead into gold.
title: Hudson Hawk

excerpt: A New York cop is conscripted into a shadowy government agency and handed to a Korean martial arts master who teaches him to dodge bullets and walk on water.
title: Remo Williams: The Adventure Begins

excerpt: A hippie commune’s pacifist ideology is tested when a violent biker gang arrives looking for a girl.
title: The Peace Killers
